Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor - Nataly Corea.
Off Calendar Jul-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Raquel Fox, Esq. appeared with Jackeline Coreas, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minors Tatiana Coreas and Nataly Coreas.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

As to Nataly Coreas:

Settlement Amount - $13,483.37.
Attorney's Fees - $3,000.00.
Costs - $483.37.

The net balance of $10,000.00 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, located at 490 Brannan Street, San Francisco, CA 94107. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving Compromises of the Disputed Claims of the Minors, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Additionally, this matter is CONTINUED to April 12, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218 for a Progress Report re: Receipt & Acknowledgement of Deposit of Money Into a Blocked Account.

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor - Tatiana Corea.
Off Calendar Jul-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
